name: io.github.alxvasilevvv/nectarin-intelligence-worker
title: NECTARIN Intelligence
description: RU/CIS AI marketing intelligence agent — 94 MCP tools across 22 marketing professions (incl. a deterministic Holt-trend demand_forecast with seasonality + confidence band, a customer_journey_map lifecycle→channel/content/KPI mapper with gap analysis, a competitive_positioning_map 2-axis perceptual map with white-space detection, an autonomous remediation/action-plan builder autonomous_plan that chains tools into a diagnose→act→measure plan, a marketing OKR planner marketing_okr_planner, a content-team capacity/throughput planner content_calendar_planner, a cross-KPI alert engine kpi_alert_engine that routes breaches to actions+tools, a CMO function-level marketing_budget_allocator, B2B win_loss_analysis, a CMO marketing-maturity scorecard marketing_maturity_assessment, a marketing-ops martech_stack_roi rationalizer, Van Westendorp pricing research pricing_psm, ABM account scoring abm_account_scoring, NPS analysis nps_analysis and B2B pipeline velocity b2b_pipeline_velocity), acting as a marketing HUB that federates the best specialist external MCPs around it through Unyly (mcp_federation — discovery + routing + tracked Unyly connect links; federation_invoke — runtime proxy of an external MCP tool call, fail-closed until connected via Unyly), with composable skills/playbooks (marketing_skill), cohort retention curve-fitting & LTV (cohort_retention_curve) and a referral/virality k-factor model (viral_loop), installed and accessed through a single Unyly front door (connect_via_unyly returns the tracked Unyly install link + access tiers; Unyly Connect fronts OAuth 2.1), with a role router that maps any specialist's job to their tailored toolkit, workflow and KPIs (role_playbook), an SEO organic-opportunity model (position→CTR→traffic→value, seo_opportunity), an organic social-media/SMM planner (reach, ER, follower growth, social_media_planner), a PR earned-media value & share-of-voice estimator (pr_value_estimator), an event/webinar ROI funnel planner (event_roi_planner), an App Store Optimization (ASO) & mobile-growth planner with paid-UA economics (aso_planner), a compounding content-marketing ROI model with payback (content_plan_roi); plus one-call strategy orchestration, a CPA/affiliate partner-program economics planner with EPC, ROAS and the sustainable commission ceiling (affiliate_program_planner), an email/CRM newsletter economics & cadence planner with RPE and list half-life (email_campaign_planner), an RFM customer-segmentation tool with per-segment CRM actions (rfm_segmenter), a heuristic landing-page CRO audit with projected uplift (landing_cro_audit), a multi-variant creative/landing test results analyzer with multiple-comparison control (creative_testing_matrix), an OLV/display frequency-cap optimizer (frequency_cap_optimizer), a churn & retention-economics tool with LTV and retention-ROI (churn_predictor), a Share-of-Search demand tracker (leading indicator of market share, share_of_search), a marketplace / retail-media planner for Ozon/Wildberries/Я.Маркет/Avito with ДРР & ROAS (retail_media_planner), a paid-search / SEM keyword-portfolio planner for Yandex Direct (search_planner), an incrementality meta-analysis tool (incrementality_meta), a batch UTM taxonomy QA auditor (utm_taxonomy_qa), a creative rotation optimizer (creative_rotation), a measured audience overlap / dedup analyzer (audience_overlap), a trend-aware budget pacing forecaster (budget_pacing_forecast), a competitive response war-game simulator (competitive_response), a media delivery quality scorer (media_quality_score), a Share-of-Voice / ESOV growth tracker (sov_tracker), a geo-holdout incrementality test tool (geo_holdout), a weekly media flowchart/flighting planner (media_flowchart), a creative production budget & timeline estimator (production_estimator), an omnichannel deduplicated reach estimator (channel_overlap), a brand-lift study calculator (brand_lift), an OLV/display reach & frequency planner (reach_frequency), an influencer/KOL roster evaluator & mix optimizer with fraud flags (influencer_planner), a profit-maximizing price optimizer with demand elasticity (price_optimizer), a creative burnout/fatigue detector (creative_fatigue), an executive one-pager that orchestrates audit + upside (board_report), a promo/discount P&L & break-even calculator (promo_planner), a what-if budget scenario comparator with ROI ranking (scenario_planner), a senior account health audit with prioritized action plan (marketing_audit), a phased go-to-market roadmap with seasonally-weighted weekly budget pacing (gtm_calendar), a conversion-maximizing budget optimizer, a marketing mix model (MMM-lite) with adstock + saturation, channel saturation / diminishing-returns response curves, RU ad-law compliance review (ФЗ-38/ОРД), A/B test power analysis, unit-economics (LTV/CAC), full-funnel modeling, seasonality forecasting, creative scoring & multi-variant generation, anomaly detection, cohort LTV, UTM builder, budget pacing, multi-touch attribution, bid simulation, deck export and CIS localization: media planning, RU benchmarks, audience insights, competitor & GEO/AEO scans, ROI/value forecasting, creative briefs and lead/funnel helpers. KV-cached LLM narrative, global rate limiting, per-tenant real-data layering (X-Tenant-Id), tool annotations, a live catalog resource, argument autocompletion and opt-in SSE. Orchestrator-worker server on Cloudflare Workers.
